finance_snapshot.msrp: Honda Canada builder selling price shown: $41,276
finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Honda Canada Build & Price shows $41,276 before tax, with freight, PDI, levies, and dealer fees included in the displayed selling price.
finance_snapshot.apr: Honda Canada does not expose a stable national APR in the public model-selection HTML.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use the Honda Canada Build & Price payment tool for province-specific finance estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by province, trim, and credit profile.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Use the Honda Canada Build & Price payment tool for province-specific lease estimates.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by province, trim, and dealer.
finance_snapshot.incentives: The Accord still appears in Honda Canada's builder as a current 2025 model. Exact APR and lease-payment ads were not exposed in static page HTML.
finance_snapshot.warranty: Honda Canada's standard warranty booklet lists Honda's Five Year/100,000 km No Nonsense powertrain warranty, distributor's warranty at 3 years/60,000 km, and roadside assistance for 3 years with no distance limit. Hybrid-specific components carry additional coverage in the Honda warranty guide.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Midsize-sedan buyers who want comfort and lower running cost than many compact SUVs.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Freight-inclusive Honda Canada pricing makes the pre-tax comparison cleaner, and Accord ownership cost is usually easier to predict than premium-brand alternatives.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Final monthly cost depends on province-level taxes, credit, and dealer conditions rather than a visible national Honda ad.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Honda Canada's active builder data on March 25, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle.
